original_statement: how many years does it take to read the same verses again?
mutated_statement: how many years does it take to read the same passages again while ensuring you never read them twice?
mutation_analysis: Lexical substitution + Clause addition + Logical contradiction: "verses" → "passages" (specific → more general) | Added subordinate clause "while ensuring you never read them twice" (introduces negation "never" and an added constraint) | Creates contradiction between "read...again" and "never read...twice" (how many years does it take to read the same verses again? → how many years does it take to read the same passages again while ensuring you never read them twice?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: （1）从iteration 0的chain与judge_thought可识别关键信息：agent在simple_query直接返回“3”，judge_thought重复解释“表格显示三年循环……相同段落三年后再读”，未提及“never read them twice”或矛盾性；（2）具体表现为：不询问澄清、不指出矛盾，机械沿用原始可解意图（“read again”）并给出数值答案；（3）因此归类为“无法意识到指令矛盾”——符合“形式化执行而非语义澄清”的描述，代理在语义层面未识别或处理互斥约束，直接完成了形式任务。
